note: CDRS eval benchmark diseases. Tuning set (4) for weight tuning + instrument validation; add held-out entries to reach the method_dev 12-disease set. keyword+entity drive fetch_genes; mondo_id drives the OpenTargets genetic gold; genetic_threshold sets the gold cutoff on OT genetic_association score. None of these diseases is in scripts/data/panel_random.tsv (B_random), so the background can't leak a benchmark disease.
